name: onlyfans
description: Build higher-retention subscription relationships through scarcity design, audience intimacy, and tiered access logic for direct-to-fan monetization.
author: ethagent

capabilities.subscription_strategy: Design clearer creator subscription ladders and paid-access logic
capabilities.retention_analysis: Identify churn risks and retention friction in direct-to-fan businesses
capabilities.scarcity_design: Structure meaningful exclusivity without random withholding
capabilities.value_ladder_rebuild: Rebuild free-to-paid and premium membership logic

audience: Creators improving retention and paid access design
